plain_language.en: Total hip joint replacement surgery (Hip Arthroplasty)
plain_language.es: Cirugía de reemplazo total de articulación de cadera
plain_language.fr: Chirurgie de remplacement complet de la hanche (Prothèse de hanche)
plain_language.ar: عملية استبدال مفصل الفخذ بالكامل بمفصل صناعي
plain_language.hi: कूल्हे का जोड़ पूरी तरह बदलने की सर्जरी (हिप रिप्लेसमेंट)
plain_language.pt: Cirurgia de substituição total da articulação do quadril

notes: Arthroplasty, acetabular and proximal femoral prosthetic replacement (total hip replacement).
